stem: When did the Central Provident Fund (CPF) commence, and which body administers it?

options.A: 1 July 1955, administered by the CPF Board, a statutory board under the Ministry of Manpower
options.B: 1 January 1984, administered by the Monetary Authority of Singapore
options.C: 1 November 2015, administered by the Ministry of Health
options.D: 1 July 1955, administered by the Public Trustee's Office

explanation: 教材 2.1 指出 CPF 于 1955 年 7 月 1 日设立,由公积金局(人力部下属法定机构)管理。MAS、MOH 与公共信托人办公室均非 CPF 的管理机构。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.13 — CPF s.2.1

stem: Which CPF account is primarily used for a member's healthcare needs and approved medical insurance premiums?
explanation: 教材 2.15–2.16 指出 MediSave 账户(MA)用于住院及医疗保险等医疗需求。OA 用于住房/投资/教育,SA 主要为养老,RA 用于退休月领。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.13 — CPF s.2.15–2.16

stem: From 1 January 2024, what is the total CPF contribution rate (employer plus employee) for an employee aged 55 and below earning more than S$750 a month?
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.13 — CPF s.2.6

stem: Who is required to make CPF contributions in Singapore?

options.A: All foreigners working in Singapore regardless of wage
options.B: Only self-employed persons earning more than S$50 a month
options.C: Singapore Citizens and Permanent Residents earning total wages of more than S$50 a month
options.D: Anyone working in Singapore earning more than S$6,000 a year

explanation: 教材 2.4 指出 CPF 缴费适用于在新加坡工作且月总工资超过 S$50 的 SC 与 PR,外国人豁免。S$6,000 是自雇者缴 MediSave 的年净营业收入门槛,非一般缴费门槛。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.13 — CPF s.2.4–2.5

stem: What is the legislated minimum interest rate per annum on CPF Ordinary Account (OA) savings?
explanation: 教材 2.21 指出 OA 利率以本地主要银行 3 个月平均利率计算,受法定最低 2.5% p.a. 约束。4% 是 SA/MA/RA 的现行下限;2.6% 是 HDB 贷款利率;6% 是含额外利息后的可能上限。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.13 — CPF s.2.21

stem: Which of the following is one of the eligibility requirements to participate in the CPF Investment Scheme (CPFIS)?

options.A: The member must be at least 21 years old
options.B: The member must have more than S$40,000 in his Ordinary Account
options.C: The member must have more than S$20,000 in his Ordinary Account (for CPFIS-OA) and/or more than S$40,000 in his Special Account (for CPFIS-SA)
options.D: The member must be a foreigner working in Singapore

explanation: 教材 2.25(a) 规定 CPFIS 资格:年满 18 岁、非未解除破产人,且 OA 超过 S$20,000(投 CPFIS-OA)及/或 SA 超过 S$40,000(投 CPFIS-SA)。A 年龄应为 18 而非 21;B 把 SA 门槛错套到 OA;外国人不符合。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.13 — CPF s.2.25(a)

stem: From 1 October 2018, what must a new CPFIS investor do before starting to invest under the scheme?

options.A: Set aside the Full Retirement Sum
options.B: Complete the Self-Awareness Questionnaire (SAQ) on the CPF website
options.C: Obtain written approval from the Monetary Authority of Singapore
options.D: Transfer all OA savings to the Special Account

explanation: 教材 2.25(a) 指出自 2018-10-01 起,新 CPFIS 投资者须先在 CPF 网站完成自我认知问卷(SAQ),以评估其基本财务知识及 CPFIS 是否适合。其余选项均非 CPFIS 的前置要求。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.13 — CPF s.2.25(a)

stem: Under the CPF retirement sums framework, the Full Retirement Sum (FRS) is best described as:

options.A: Equal to the Basic Retirement Sum (BRS)
options.B: Two times the BRS, providing higher payouts that also cover rental expenses
options.D: A sum that covers only basic living needs excluding rent

explanation: 教材 3.2 指出 FRS 是 BRS 的两倍,可提供更高月领并涵盖租金支出。仅覆盖基本生活(不含租金)的是 BRS;四倍 BRS 是 2025 年起的 ERS 上限。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.13 — CPF s.3.2

stem: A member is automatically included in CPF LIFE if he is a Singapore Citizen or Permanent Resident and:

options.A: He was born in 1958 or after and has at least S$60,000 in his Retirement Account when he starts his monthly payouts
options.B: He was born before 1958 and has at least S$40,000 in his Retirement Account
options.C: He has reached age 55 with any balance in his Retirement Account
options.D: He has chosen the CPF LIFE Escalating Plan

explanation: 教材 3.13 指出,1958 年或以后出生的 SC/PR,且开始领取月领时 RA 至少 S$60,000 者将自动纳入 CPF LIFE。S$40,000 的旧门槛适用于 2013-2016 年间满 55 岁的特定群体,非现行自动纳入标准。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.13 — CPF s.3.13

stem: Which statement about the three CPF LIFE plans is correct?

options.A: The Standard Plan's monthly payouts increase by 2% every year to protect against inflation
options.B: A member who does not choose a plan is placed on the Basic Plan by default
options.C: The Escalating Plan's monthly payouts increase by 2% every year, starting lower but eventually higher than the Standard Plan
options.D: The Basic Plan provides the highest and most level monthly payouts of the three

explanation: 教材 3.14(a) 指出 Escalating Plan 月领每年增 2% 抗通胀,起点较低但最终高于 Standard 与 Basic。每年增 2% 的是 Escalating 而非 Standard;默认计划是 Standard 而非 Basic;Standard 提供较高且水平的月领,Basic 月领较低且会递减。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.13 — CPF s.3.14(a)

stem: Contributions to a member's MediSave Account are subject to a maximum amount known as the Basic Healthcare Sum (BHS). Which statement is correct?

options.A: The BHS continues to be adjusted every year even after the member turns 65
options.B: Amounts above the BHS are forfeited
options.C: The BHS is the same as the Full Retirement Sum
options.D: The BHS is fixed for life when the member turns 65; for those below 65 in 2024 the prevailing BHS is S$71,500

explanation: 教材 3.24–3.25 指出 BHS 在会员 65 岁时定终身;2024 年 65 岁以下会员的现行 BHS 为 S$71,500。超过 BHS 的金额不会被没收,而是转入 SA/RA(或已达 FRS 则转 OA)。BHS 与 FRS 是不同概念。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.13 — CPF s.3.24–3.25

stem: What is the maximum sum assured under the Dependants' Protection Scheme (DPS) for a CPF member up to age 60?
explanation: 教材 4.3 指出 DPS 对会员 60 岁前的最高保额为 S$70,000;60 至 65 岁为 S$55,000;最低保额为 S$5,000。S$60,000 与 DPS 保额无关。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.13 — CPF s.4.3

stem: Which statement about CPF legacy planning and nominations is correct?

options.A: CPF savings form part of a member's estate and can be included in his will
options.B: A CPF nomination is automatically revoked upon the member's marriage
options.C: Where no nomination is made, savings are paid directly to nominees within 17 working days
options.D: A CPF nomination does not cover any CPF LIFE premium balance

explanation: 教材 5.4 指出 CPF 提名在会员结婚时自动撤销。CPF 储蓄不构成遗产、不能纳入遗嘱(5.4);17 个工作日适用于有提名的情形(5.2),无提名则交公共信托人办公室、最长可达六个月(5.3);提名涵盖四账户及 CPF LIFE 保费余额(5.1)。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part I Ch.13 — CPF s.5.1–5.4
